target: 11. Final Ferry
We repeat. Currently, a disaster of unknown cause has occurred, centered around Hitogashima Shrine.
Those who wish to evacuate to the mainland, please board the temporary ferry departing shortly.
Look, Shin-chan! The ferry is already at the harbor!
But there's no one around at all... Even though they've been making all these announcements.
...Where's Dad? I wonder if he got on the ferry first?
Hey, Mio. Don't you think it's strange that we can't see a single other islander or tourist?
Maybe everyone has already boarded the ferry. I bet Tokiko and Sou-kun did too.
Come on, let's get on the ferry!
Mio, wait!
Huh? Why?
Just in case, I'll go first. You follow behind me, Mio.
(This is strange... I don't sense anyone at all.)
(What does this mean? Is there no one on board?)
(S-Someone's collapsed!?)
Um, are you okay--
...What... is this? Mi...o...?
Why is Mio here…?
(If that's the case... Then the Mio who's been with me all this time is...)
I'm glad you got to meet her, Shin-chan. The real me.
...A Shadow!!
Guh…!?
Dad's knife cuts really well. He kept it in perfect condition.
When… did you switch…?
When do you think? Shin-chan, why don't you try looking at the big picture like you always do?
Th... That's strange... That's impossible...
Because you're... wearing a yukata...!
(The Shadow Mio I saw before was in her school uniform. That's why, so I could tell her apart from the Shadow...)
(Sou asked Toki-chan to help her put on the yukata, and yet...)
(For the Shadow to be wearing the same yukata, it would have had to see Mio wearing it somewhere...)
Ah...
Sou, were you a fan of that person?
Nah, not really a fan, but since we're here, I figured I might as well take a picture.
Whoa, it's bright…!
No kidding. The camera flashes have been crazy for a while now. That person must be really popular.
(It was back then...!)
During the festival... you copied Mio in her yukata, didn't you!?
Exactly. I really have to thank Kaori-chan.
You didn't just copy her... Y-You killed Mio!?
Huh, me? What are you talking about, Shin-chan? We've been together this whole time.
I guess with that much blood loss, even you can't think straight anymore, huh, Shin-chan?
(That's right, this Shadow was with me. Then who killed Mio...)
...U-Ugh.
(It's... no use... I can't stand... anymore...)
Are you about at your limit? Should I put you out of your misery?
(Is... is this the end...?)
Stop.
Don't finish him off yet.
(Sh-Shadow me...?)
(Damn it... it's the guy from back then...)
Papa and Mama told me... to stay quiet... More importantly, answer my question--
...Well, whatever.
Even if you don't answer, I'll just ask you later...
(That Shadow-- It's the same as the one that took Totsumura-san's place...!)
(Just like with Totsumura-san, there's a Shadow that looks exactly like me...?)
(I was infected with the Shadow Sickness... No... I had been infected! Right from the start!!)
(This guy killed Mio...!)
I told you, didn't I? This guy can go back to the past and start over.
I don't know the exact conditions, but it's definitely triggered by dying.
Did you forget why I had you act as his watcher?
I haven't forgotten. But he looked like he was in so much pain.
Well, whatever. Let's go.
Sorry, Shin-chan. I was told to "play with you while keeping an eye on you."
It really felt like you were with Mio, didn't it? I had a pretty good time.
Bye-bye, Shin-chan. By the time you die, I think everything will be over.
Guh... ahh...
("Everything will be over"...? What on earth... does that mean?)
(No... more importantly, Mio...)
Mio, hang in there...!
Mio…!!
Ugh... d-damn it!!
